rule webshell_FoxWSO_str
{
	meta:

	strings:
		$str1 = "tjwlltii akhmhcij"
		$str2 = "!defined('lmhelqpg')"
		$str3 = { 69 66 28 21 66 75 6e 63 74 69 6f 6e 5f 65 78 69 73 74 73 28 22 94 e3 d7 a9 a7 9a e0 c5 f3 f6 22 29 }

	condition:

}
